metadata.name: i blew you a soap bubble now what
metadata.author: flexi + cope
metadata.source: flexi + cope - i blew you a soap bubble now what.milk

perFrameCode: d = 20; // distance of the sphere, the farther you're away the more you'll see on the horizon
z = 0.4; // distance of the pane where the scene is projected on, wider distance = smaller apex angle of the camera, very small distances = fish eyes view
w1 = n*0.01;    // solid angles to rotate the sphere in its origin
